title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: U.S. Forest Service unveils extensive closures of research facilities
items.description: Cost-cutting move is expected to cause resignations and turmoil

items.title: Slasher sequel: Trump again proposes major cuts to U.S. science spending
items.description: Science advocates urge Congress to reject 2027 budget plan

items.title: History and mystery surround NASA’s 2028 nuclear Mars mission
items.description: Fission-powered space flight, a 60-year dream, would supercharge outer Solar System exploration

items.title: Offering scientists cash to spot errors in published papers doesn’t work
items.description: The ERROR project tried enticing reviewers with payments. Now it’s launching a journal—and promising papers as rewards

items.title: Bumble bees show a surprising knack for rhythm
items.description: Flexible rhythm perception, once thought to require a big brain, has been shown in humble bumble bees

items.title: How fast is the universe expanding? Cosmic ‘illusions’ may hold answer
items.description: Repeated supernovae flashes, warped by gravity, could resolve a cosmological dispute

items.title: China now tops the U.S. in R&D spending by one key measure
items.description: China reached long expected milestone in 2024

items.title: Trippy tobacco? Plants engineered to make five psychedelics at once
items.description: Approach could enable production of new medications for depression, anxiety, and post-traumatic stress

items.title: Some black holes are ‘forbidden,’ ripples in spacetime reveal
items.description: Analysis of gravitational waves supports theory that some stars explode without leaving behind black holes

items.title: Across the social sciences, half of research doesn’t replicate
items.description: Ambitious effort tested whether more than 100 papers held up on multiple types of “repeatability” tests
